name: Volcanic Scattershot
name_jp: ヴォルカニック・バックショット
desc: If this card is sent to the GY: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If this card is sent to the GY by the effect of a "Blaze Accelerator" card: You can send 2 "Volcanic Scattershots" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If this card is sent to the GY by the effect of a "Blaze Accelerator" card: You can send 2 "Volcanic Scattershots" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If this card is sent to the GY by the effect of a "Blaze Accelerator" card: You can send 2 "Volcanic Scattershots" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
